metadata.description: BackOffice screenshot capture for StoreHub KB writers — clean PNGs from your own logged-in Chrome on macOS, built-in tools only.

plugins.name: backoffice-screenshot
plugins.description: Capture clean PNGs of StoreHub BackOffice (incl. pre-GA / flag-gated screens) from your own logged-in Chrome on macOS — no CleanShot, no paid apps, no Playwright login wall.
